texto: When we really understand it, we will always find grace offensive. And that's exactly the way it should be. If we start to feel comfortable with grace, then we've lost what it really means.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jay Bakker sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “When we really understand it, we will always find grace offensive. And that's exactly the way it …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, grace, really, útil em momentos de reflexao.

texto: In order for grace to truly be grace, it has to extend to absolutely everyone, no matter what, no questions, no exceptions. Otherwise we think that somehow, by living a moral life...we've deserved it
explicacao: Citação de Jay Bakker sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “In order for grace to truly be grace, it has to extend to absolutely everyone, no matter what, no…” articula reflexao, grace, order em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
